backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor with a single `healthCheck` query function that always returns true.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (landing page, hero section, key features, footer) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line descriptions of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark mode design tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app titled 'Smart Hospital Management System' that mounts the app at `#root` via `src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with two routes: `/` rendering LandingPage and `/login` rendering LoginPage.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Full-width dark-blue footer with brand info, navigation links (including Login portal), services list, and contact details including an emergency hotline.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, gradient overlay, headline, subheadline, 'Book an Appointment' CTA, and a red 'EMERGENCY: Find Nearest Hospital' CTA button.
frontend/src/components/KeyFeaturesSecti: Responsive four-card grid section highlighting Lightning-Fast Records, AI-Powered Scheduling, Real-Time Emergency Routing, and Flawless Resource Management with icons, badges, and bullet points.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive navigation bar for the MediCore app with logo, nav links, Sign In and Book Appointment CTAs, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a useHealthCheck hook that calls the backend healthCheck method via the actor, enabled only when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the medical-themed color palette.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page layout that composes the Navbar, HeroSection, KeyFeaturesSection, and Footer components.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with role selection (patient, doctor, admin), email/password form, and a simulated submit handler with loading state.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (including a medical blue palette), border radii, shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 3) for a Smart Hospital Management System built with React and Tailwind CSS, documenting existing features, architectural notes, known issues, and image requirements for the Landing Page and Role-Based Login Page.
